Hourly to Salary Calculator

Convert your hourly wage to an equivalent annual salary. Enter your hourly rate and hours worked to see yearly, monthly, and weekly earnings.

FAQ

How do I convert hourly to salary?

Multiply your hourly rate × hours per week × 52 weeks. For example, $20/hr × 40 hrs × 52 = $41,600 annual salary.

How many work hours in a year?

A standard full-time year is 2,080 hours (40 hours/week × 52 weeks). Accounting for holidays and PTO, actual hours may be around 1,920-2,000.

Does this include benefits?

This calculator shows gross pay only. Total compensation including benefits (health insurance, 401k, etc.) is typically 20-30% higher.
